content:
Will bump here since there was a couple of changes since last time..!
### https://dansa.github.io/SKeyDB/#/collection 
is now fully working(?)

(Yes i know the UX and layout is quite bad and messy, sorry I am working on it <:Aurita_pinch:1468258028271833119> )
(Yes mobile UI is still terrible.. I promise I didn't forget my handheld homies)

- You can toggle characters,wheels,posses you own, change their levels and enlightens and some basic sorting.
- This data gets saved locally in your browser, but you can save/load it with the (save to file) buttons if you clear your browser often, or want to move to another device or something.
- There is a button to export as png, this collects all your characters (or wheels) in a compact grid screenshot, with some styling and sorting options. 
  - Be aware the file sizes can get quite large.. ~10-20mb with Width and Pixel ratio maxed out, so maybe not ideal setting everything to max for discord sharing lol.
- The ownership and levels will reflect in the /builder page, you are not blocked from slotting in/importing unowned units, but they will display clearly if they are.

⚠️  The Quick-toggle "Set Owned/Set Unowned" buttons are a little spooky. What they do is toggling every single thing displayed (through filters or search) as either owned/unowned, good if you quickly want to disown yourself of any Aequor propaganda. These quick-toggles will be expanded and explained better in a future update..

👀 ps there is some QoL, like holding shift and scrolling on the awakener to quickly increase/decrease enlightens, this also works for levels if you have the level changing thing "active", all the +- chevrons also support holding down.
